topStories.title: US-Iran ceasefire soon? Washington sends 15-point proposal to end West Asia war — what both sides want
topStories.description: Two Pakistani officials reportedly said on Wednesday that Iran received a 15-point proposal from the US to reach a ceasefire. Here's what Washington and Tehran want:

topStories.title: Can AI Improve Your Sleep? Eight Sleep's $50 Mn Funding Takes Agentic Turn
topStories.description: Eight Sleep, the New York-based sleep technology company, is planning to expand into the artificial intelligence (AI)-powered predictive sleep health space. The move comes after the startup raised $50...

topStories.title: ‘A heinous crime’: Air strikes kill seven fighters in Iraq’s Anbar
topStories.description: Police source tells Al Jazeera attack hits positions of the Iran-aligned PMF, which the US has increasingly targeted.

topStories.title: Gurugram rape case: Supreme Court criticises Haryana Police’s insensitive handling of four-year-old child’s rape case
topStories.description: Supreme Court mandates swift action and oversight in the sensitive case, forming a SIT while condemning the Haryana Police’s failure to adequately protect and assist the young survivor

topStories.title: US Democrats condemn war on Iran as Senate resolution fails
topStories.description: The latest war powers resolution in the US Senate to end US attacks on Iran has failed in a 47-53 vote.

topStories.title: Marcos promises 'flow of oil' as Philippines declares energy emergency
topStories.description: The President says the country will procure one million barrels of oil to add to the current stock.

topStories.title: Supreme Court says no SC status for those who convert: ‘Caste status stood eclipsed in the eyes of law’
topStories.description: The court underscored that this loss of status carries with it the termination of all statutory protections, reservations and entitlements of SC identity.

topStories.title: Is Iran’s negotiating position stronger than when US-Israeli war started?
topStories.description: Tehran believes so, and will seek to extract concessions that the US and Gulf nations can't agree to, analysts caution.

dailyNews.title: Congress questions Supreme Court order on SC status for converts
dailyNews.description: Randeep Surjewala says issue of Scheduled Caste status for converts to Christianity and Islam has been pending before a three-judge Bench of the Supreme Court since 2011

dailyNews.description: Iranian officials continue to deny any peace talks, amid reports the US sent the country a ceasefire proposal.

dailyNews.title: ‘Do not call your defeat an agreement’ IRGC warns US, Israel
dailyNews.description: The spokesman for the IRGC has rejected President Trump’s suggestions that talks have been taking place with Iran.

dailyNews.title: West Asia War: Sharif briefs Saudi Crown Prince MBS as Pakistan pushes to mediate US-Iran talks
dailyNews.description: In a bid to mediate rising tensions in the Middle East, Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif briefed Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman on diplomatic efforts aimed at fostering dialogue between the US and Iran. As conflict escalates, can Pakistan play a pivotal role in restoring peace?

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court declines plea against Vande Mataram circular
dailyNews.description: The court called the plea “premature” and founded on “vague apprehension of discrimination”, noting that there was no material to show any coercive action

dailyNews.title: Iran’s new security boss Mohammad Zolghadr: Why his appointment matters
dailyNews.description: Zolghadr, an ex-IRGC commander, will manage Iran's security amid external US-Israeli pressures and internal unrest.

dailyNews.title: Cannabis may backfire for mental health disorders, major study finds
dailyNews.description: Medicinal cannabinoids show little strong evidence of helping mental health or substance use disorders, University of Sydney researchers concluded in a major review.

dailyNews.title: Out-of-control teen mob in DC reveals failure of blue city soft-on-crime policies
dailyNews.description: Washington, D.C.'s juvenile curfew authority is set to expire, and Mayor Muriel Bowser and mayoral candidates face pressure to address teen takeovers.

dailyNews.title: One American's detention in Lebanon exposed a truth that is now devastating an entire country
dailyNews.description: Hezbollah's unchecked power, backed by Iran, enabled Amer Fakhoury's detention and now fuels a devastating war in Lebanon its people never chose.

dailyNews.title: Maryland Dems mocked for prioritizing tampons in men’s bathrooms amid state deficit: 'Nonsense'
dailyNews.description: Maryland Democrats put on notice by GOP colleague who slammed them for focusing on putting tampons in men's bathrooms over real problems in Annapolis, like the state's growing deficit.

dailyNews.title: Cowboys star Dak Prescott's ex posts about 'growth' days after couple split before wedding
dailyNews.description: Dallas Cowboys star Dak Prescott's former fiancée, Sarah Jane Ramos, posted about "growth" days after the couple's relationship ended with the wedding around the corner.

dailyNews.title: Fox Nation, Tunnels to Towers explores how America’s pastime helped a grieving New York heal after 9/11
dailyNews.description: The New York Mets and Yankees reflect on baseball's role in healing America after 9/11 in a new Tunnels to Towers documentary on Fox Nation.

dailyNews.title: Tuberville suggests billionaires buying college programs would be worse than an NFL-style TV deal
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tommy Tuberville suggests that he'd rather see the NFL's unified media rights model in college football than billionaires buying and running programs.

dailyNews.title: UNC fires Hubert Davis after historic NCAA Tournament first-round collapse against VCU
dailyNews.description: UNC fired head coach Hubert Davis after the Tar Heels blew a 19-point second-half lead and lost to VCU in overtime, 82-78, in the NCAA Tournament.

topStories.title: Trump urges RNC chair's wife to run for Congress, pledges endorsement: 'RUN, SYDNEY, RUN!'
topStories.description: President Donald Trump encouraged Sydney Gruters, wife of Republican National Committee Chair Joe Gruters, to run in Florida's 16th Congressional District, pledging to back her if she runs.

topStories.title: Serious about safer roads? Get dangerous, unqualified truckers off them now
topStories.description: Dalilah's Law, backed by President Trump, passed the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee. Now it heads to a full congressional vote.

topStories.title: Democrats broke airport security. Now they're calling the solution dangerous
topStories.description: President Trump ordered ICE officers to U.S. airports amid a TSA staffing crisis. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries warned the deployment could result in agents killing travelers.

topStories.title: Democrat Emily Gregory Wins Florida Special Election in Mar-a-Lago’s District
topStories.description: Emily Gregory’s victory in Palm Beach brought the Democratic surge to President Trump’s backyard, while a union leader leads in a race for a state senate seat vacated by Florida’s lieutenant governor.

topStories.title: Inside Trump’s Secret Deal to Deport Migrants to Cameroon
topStories.description: In Cameroon, the Trump administration found a partner it could pressure into accepting covertly deported migrants.

topStories.title: Late Night Questions the ‘Very Big Present’ Trump Got From Iran
topStories.description: Josh Johnson was puzzled by what kind of gift the president could have received “from the people you are currently at war with.”

topStories.title: U.S. sent Iran 15-point plan to end war, report says; Trump says 'in negotiations right now'
topStories.description: "Operation Epic Fury continues unabated" to achieve President Donald Trump's military objectives, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

topStories.title: Sen. Warren: DOD answers show no anti-corruption protocols for Trump children
topStories.description: Democrats have been hotly critical of the Trump family's business dealings while President Donald Trump serves in the White House.

topStories.title: Emily Gregory projected to win Florida special election to represent Trump, Mar-a-Lago
topStories.description: President Donald Trump had endorsed fellow Republican Jon Maples in the special election against Emily Gregory, the Democratic nominee.

dailyNews.title: Denmark’s PM Frederiksen suffers election setback after standing up to Trump over Greenland
dailyNews.description: Frederiksen had sought to capitalize on popular support after standing up to Trump's push to annex Greenland, a self-governing Danish territory.

dailyNews.title: Venezuela opposition leader María Corina Machado calls for full privatization of oil industry
dailyNews.description: Machado's remarks come as the oil industry remains hesitant to invest in Venezuela after the U.S. ousted former President Nicolas Maduro.

dailyNews.title: Trump's daily Iran video briefing fuels concerns he's not getting a full picture on the war
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — Each day since the start of the war in Iran, U.S. military officials compile a video update for President Donald Trump that shows video of the biggest, most successful strikes on Iranian targets over the previous 48 hours, three current U.S. officials and a former U.S. official said

dailyNews.title: Justice Department steps up probe into Trump target John Brennan
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department has requested House Intelligence Committee records related to former CIA Director John Brennan, a frequent target of President Donald Trump, according to two sources familiar with the request

dailyNews.title: Senate Republicans optimistic about potential deal to fund TSA
dailyNews.description: There’s a potential deal in the works to re-open the Department of Homeland Security, according to four sources familiar with the negotiations between Congress and the White House. NBC News’ Tom Costello reports.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin sworn in to serve as Homeland Security Secretary
dailyNews.description: President Trump held a swearing-in ceremony for the Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin at the White House. Mullin pledged to "fight every single day" to protect the homeland and commented on the ongoing partial government shutdown.

dailyNews.title: 'Oh, golly': Britain's embattled Starmer navigates Trump's Iran war ire
dailyNews.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer likely won't fire back insults at President Donald Trump, those close to him say.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on with Pentagon expected to send more troops to Middle East
dailyNews.description: President Trump said several members of his administration were involved in talks with Iran about the ongoing war.

dailyNews.title: We asked every lawmaker in Congress what they're doing to end the DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers and President Trump appear to be edging closer to a framework to wrap up the Department of Homeland Security shutdown — but a breakthrough has remained out of reach. CBS News contacted every House and Senate office to ask what they're doing to end the shutdown.

dailyNews.title: 3/24: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump says Vance and Rubio are involved in talks with Iran; Senate inches toward a potential DHS funding solution.

dailyNews.title: Democrat flips Florida state legislative district that includes Mar-a-Lago
dailyNews.description: Democrat Emily Gregory won a special election for a Florida state House seat on Tuesday, flipping a district that is home to President Trump's estate, Mar-a-Lago.

dailyNews.title: Senate rejects latest push to rein in Trump's powers in Iran as war's off-ramp unclear
dailyNews.description: Democrats have vowed to keep forcing votes on the issue as they seek public testimony from administration officials.
